message:
fix: clippy lints and test assertion improvements

- budget.rs: collapse multi-line let binding into single line (formatting)
- bidi.rs: replace `seg.len() > 0` with `!seg.is_empty()` (clippy lint)
- scrollbar.rs: replace `content.as_char().is_some()` with
  `!is_empty() && !is_continuation()` for wide emoji head cell assertions,
  which is more robust for grapheme-cluster-based storage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
